evidence_excerpt: At 6-month post-therapeutic follow-up, treatment was successful: no trypanosomes in blood or CSF, CSF WBC <5 cells/mm3, and his general clinical condition was normal.

quality_of_life.functional_status_evidence_excerpt: Six months after treatment his general clinical condition was normal, indicating return to usual function.
quality_of_life.symptom_burden_evidence_excerpt: Six-month follow-up reported treatment success with no trypanosomes detected and normal clinical condition.

timeline_events.evidence_excerpt: Six months after therapy, no trypanosomes detected in blood or CSF.
Six-month follow-up noted his general clinical condition was normal.

notes_on_uncertainty: Follow-up data are reported only up to 6 months after diagnosis; no information is available beyond 12 months. Species identification had some uncertainty (TgsGP PCR negative), but clinical course and tests supported HAT. Long-term outcomes beyond one year cannot be directly confirmed.
